parameters.description: User API key we're looking for.

post.summary: Initiate an Asynchronous request to generate images
post.description:
This endpoint will immediately return with the UUID of the request for generation.
This endpoint will always be accepted, even if there are no workers available currently to fulfill this request.
Perhaps some will appear in the next 10 minutes.
Asynchronous requests live for 10 minutes before being considered stale and being deleted.

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: The API Key corresponding to a registered user.

get.summary: Retrieve the status of an Asynchronous generation request without images
get.description: Use this request to check the status of a currently running asynchronous request without consuming bandwidth.

post.summary: Check if there are generation requests queued for fulfillment
post.description: This endpoint is used by registered workers only

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: The API Key corresponding to a registered user.

post.summary: Submit aesthetic ratings for generated images to be used by LAION and Stability
post.description:
AI
The request has to have been sent as shared: true.
You can select the best image in the set, and/or provide a rating for each or some images in the set.
If you select best-of image, you will gain 4 kudos. Each rating is 5 kudos. Best-of will be ignored when ratings conflict with it.
You can never gain more kudos than you spent for this generation. Your reward at max will be your kudos consumption - 1.

get.summary: Retrieve the full status of an Asynchronous generation request
get.description:
This request will include all already generated images in download URL or base64 encoded .webp files.
As such, you are requested to not retrieve this endpoint often. Instead use the /check/ endpoint first
This endpoint is limited to 10 request per minute

delete.description: This request will include all already generated images in base64 encoded .webp files.

post.summary: Submit a generated image
post.description: This endpoint is used by registered workers only

post.summary: Initiate an Asynchronous request to generate text
post.description:
This endpoint will immediately return with the UUID of the request for generation.
This endpoint will always be accepted, even if there are no workers available currently to fulfill this request.
Perhaps some will appear in the next 20 minutes.
Asynchronous requests live for 20 minutes before being considered stale and being deleted.

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: The API Key corresponding to a registered user.

post.summary: Check if there are generation requests queued for fulfillment
post.description: This endpoint is used by registered workers only

get.description: This request will include all already generated texts.

delete.description: This request will include all already generated texts.

post.description: This endpoint is used by registered workers only

post.summary: Initiate an Asynchronous request to interrogate an image
post.description:
This endpoint will immediately return with the UUID of the request for interrogation.
This endpoint will always be accepted, even if there are no workers available currently to fulfill this request.
Perhaps some will appear in the next 20 minutes.
Asynchronous requests live for 20 minutes before being considered stale and being deleted.

get.summary: Retrieve the full status of an interrogation request
get.description:
This request will include all already generated images.
As such, you are requested to not retrieve this endpoint often. Instead use the /check/ endpoint first

delete.description: This request will return all already interrogated image results.

post.summary: Submit the results of an interrogated image
post.description: This endpoint is used by registered workers only

put.summary: Endpoint for horde admins to perform operations on users

delete.description:
Only the user or a horde moderator can use this endpoint.
A deleted user will initially be hidden and cannot be used anymore
After a month of being set as deleted, the same request will wipe the user permanently this action is then irreversible!

get.summary: List Worker Messages

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filter the messages by user id (numerical). If user is not moderator, they can only see their own messages.

parameters.name: worker_id
parameters.description: Filter the messages by worker id (numerical).

parameters.name: validity
parameters.description: Filter messages based on whether they're expired or not. Possible values are 'active', 'expired' and 'all

parameters.description: Which page of results to return. Each page has 50 messages.

Details of a registered worker
get.description:
Can retrieve the details of a worker even if inactive
(A worker is considered inactive if it has not checked in for 5 minutes)

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: The Moderator or Owner API key.

get.summary: Details of a registered worker
get.description:
Can retrieve the details of a worker even if inactive
(A worker is considered inactive if it has not checked in for 5 minutes)

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: The Moderator or Owner API key.

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: The Moderator or Owner API key.

delete.description:
This will delete the worker and their statistics. Will not affect the kudos generated by that worker for their owner.
Only the worker's owner and an admin can use this endpoint.
This action is unrecoverable!

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: The Moderator or Owner API key.

prompt.description: The prompt which will be sent to Stable Diffusion to generate an image.

nsfw.description: Set to true if this request is NSFW. This will skip workers which censor images.

trusted_workers.description: When true, only trusted workers will serve this request. When False, Evaluating workers will also be used which can increase speed but adds more risk!

validated_backends.description: When true, only inference backends that are validated by the AI Horde devs will serve this request. When False, non-validated backends will also be used which can increase speed but you may end up with unexpected results.

slow_workers.description: When True, allows slower workers to pick up this request. Disabling this incurs an extra kudos cost.

extra_slow_workers.description: When True, allows very slower workers to pick up this request. Use this when you don't mind waiting a lot.

censor_nsfw.description: If the request is SFW, and the worker accidentally generates NSFW, it will send back a censored image.

items.description: Specify up to 5 workers which are allowed to service this request.

worker_blacklist.description: If true, the worker list will be treated as a blacklist instead of a whitelist.

items.description: Specify which models are allowed to be used for this request.

source_image.description: The Base64-encoded webp to use for img2img.

source_processing.description: If source_image is provided, specifies how to process it.

source_mask.description: If source_processing is set to 'inpainting' or 'outpainting', this parameter can be optionally provided as the  Base64-encoded webp mask of the areas to inpaint. If this arg is not passed, the inpainting/outpainting mask has to be embedded as alpha channel.

r2.description: If True, the image will be sent via cloudflare r2 download link.

shared.description: If True, The image will be shared with LAION for improving their dataset. This will also reduce your kudos consumption by 2. For anonymous users, this is always True.

replacement_filter.description: If enabled, suspicious prompts are sanitized through a string replacement filter instead.

dry_run.description: When true, the endpoint will simply return the cost of the request in kudos and exit.

proxied_account.description: If using a service account as a proxy, provide this value to identify the actual account from which this request is coming from.

disable_batching.description: When true, This request will not use batching. This will allow you to retrieve accurate seeds. Feature is restricted to Trusted users and Patreons.

allow_downgrade.description: When true and the request requires upfront kudos and the account does not have enough The request will be downgraded in steps and resolution so that it does not need upfront kudos.

webhook.description: Provide a URL where the AI Horde will send a POST call after each delivered generation. The request will include the details of the job as well as the request ID.

style.description: A horde style ID or name to use for this generation

n.description: The amount of images to generate.

seed.description: The seed to use to generate this request. You can pass text as well as numbers.

seed_variation.description: If passed with multiple n, the provided seed will be incremented every time by this value.

image_is_control.description: Set to True if the image submitted is a pre-generated control map for ControlNet use.

return_control_map.description: Set to True if you want the ControlNet map returned instead of a generated image.

height.description: The height of the image to generate.

width.description: The width of the image to generate.

items.description: The list of post-processors to apply to the image, in the order to be applied.

karras.description: Set to True to enable karras noise scheduling tweaks.

tiling.description: Set to True to create images that stitch together seamlessly.

hires_fix.description: Set to True to process the image at base resolution before upscaling and re-processing or to use Stable Cascade 2-pass.

clip_skip.description: The number of CLIP language processor layers to skip.

workflow.description: Explicitly specify the horde-engine workflow to use.

transparent.description: Set to True to generate the image using Layer Diffuse, creating an image with a transparent background.

name.description: The exact name or CivitAI Model Page ID of the LoRa. If is_version is true, this should be the CivitAI version ID.

model.description: The strength of the LoRa to apply to the SD model.

clip.description: The strength of the LoRa to apply to the clip model.

inject_trigger.description: If set, will try to discover a trigger for this LoRa which matches or is similar to this string and inject it into the prompt. If 'any' is specified it will be pick the first trigger.

is_version.description: If true, will consider the LoRa ID as a CivitAI version ID and search accordingly. Ensure the name is an integer.

name.description: The exact name or CivitAI ID of the Textual Inversion.

inject_ti.description: If set, Will automatically add this TI filename to the prompt or negative prompt accordingly using the provided strength. If this is set to None, then the user will have to manually add the embed to the prompt themselves.

strength.description: The strength with which to apply the TI to the prompt. Only used when inject_ti is not None

text.description: The extra text to send along with this generation.

reference.description: The reference which points how and where this text should be used.

image.description: The Base64-encoded webp to use for further processing.

strength.description: Optional field, determining the strength to use for the processing

message.description: The error message for this status code.

rc.description: The return code for this error. See: https://github.com/Haidra-Org/AI-Horde/blob/main/README_return_codes.md

additionalProperties.description: The details of the validation error

id.description: The UUID of the request. Use this to retrieve the request status in the future.

kudos.description: The expected kudos consumption for this request.

message.description: Any extra information from the horde about this request.

code.description: A unique identifier for this warning.

message.description: Something that you should be aware about this request, in plain text.

shared.description: If True, These images have been shared with LAION.

finished.description: The amount of finished jobs in this request.

processing.description: The amount of still processing jobs in this request.

restarted.description: The amount of jobs that timed out and had to be restarted or were reported as failed by a worker.

waiting.description: The amount of jobs waiting to be picked up by a worker.

done.description: True when all jobs in this request are done. Else False.

faulted.description: True when this request caused an internal server error and could not be completed.

wait_time.description: The expected amount to wait (in seconds) to generate all jobs in this request.

queue_position.description: The position in the requests queue. This position is determined by relative Kudos amounts.

kudos.description: The amount of total Kudos this request has consumed until now.

is_possible.description: If False, this request will not be able to be completed with the pool of workers currently available.

img.title: Generated Image
img.description: The generated image as a Base64-encoded .webp file.

seed.title: Generation Seed
seed.description: The seed which generated this image.

id.title: Generation ID
id.description: The ID for this image.

censored.description: When true this image has been censored by the worker's safety filter.

worker_id.title: Worker ID
worker_id.description: The UUID of the worker which generated this image.

worker_name.title: Worker Name
worker_name.description: The name of the worker which generated this image.

model.title: Generation Model
model.description: The model which generated this image.

state.title: Generation State
state.description: OBSOLETE (Use the gen_metadata field). The state of this generation.

type.description: The relevance of the metadata field

value.description: The value of the metadata field

ref.description: Optionally a reference for the metadata (e.g. a lora ID)

best.description: The UUID of the best image in this generation batch (only used when 2+ images generated). If 2+ aesthetic ratings are also provided, then they take precedence if they're not tied.

id.description: The UUID of image being rated.

rating.description: The aesthetic rating 1-10 for this image.

artifacts.description:
The artifacts rating for this image.
0 for flawless generation that perfectly fits to the prompt.
1 for small, hardly recognizable flaws.
2 small flaws that can easily be spotted, but don not harm the aesthetic experience.
3 for flaws that look obviously wrong, but only mildly harm the aesthetic experience.
4 for flaws that look obviously wrong & significantly harm the aesthetic experience.
5 for flaws that make the image look like total garbage.

reward.description: The amount of kudos gained for submitting this request.

max_pixels.description: The maximum amount of pixels this worker can generate.

items.description: Words which, when detected will refuste to pick up any jobs.

allow_img2img.description: If True, this worker will pick up img2img requests.

allow_painting.description: If True, this worker will pick up inpainting/outpainting requests.

allow_unsafe_ipaddr.description: If True, this worker will pick up img2img requests coming from clients with an unsafe IP.

allow_post_processing.description: If True, this worker will pick up requests requesting post-processing.

allow_controlnet.description: If True, this worker will pick up requests requesting ControlNet.

allow_sdxl_controlnet.description: If True, this worker will pick up requests requesting SDXL ControlNet.

allow_lora.description: If True, this worker will pick up requests requesting LoRas.

limit_max_steps.description: If True, This worker will not pick up jobs with more steps than the average allowed for that model. this is for use by workers which might run into issues doing too many steps.

name.description: The Name of the Worker.

items.description: Users with priority to use this worker.

nsfw.description: Whether this worker can generate NSFW requests or not.

items.description: Which models this worker is serving.

bridge_agent.description: The worker name, version and website.

threads.description: How many threads this worker is running. This is used to accurately the current power available in the horde.

require_upfront_kudos.description: If True, this worker will only pick up requests where the owner has the required kudos to consume already available.

amount.description: How many jobvs to pop at the same time

extra_slow_worker.description: If True, marks the worker as very slow. You should only use this if your mps/s is lower than 0.1.Extra slow workers are excluded from normal requests but users can opt in to use them.

id.description: The UUID for this image generation.

items.description: The UUID for this image generation.

ttl.description: The amount of seconds before this job is considered stale and aborted.

model.description: Which of the available models to use for this request.

source_image.description: The Base64-encoded webp to use for img2img.

source_processing.description: If source_image is provided, specifies how to process it.

source_mask.description: If img_processing is set to 'inpainting' or 'outpainting', this parameter can be optionally provided as the mask of the areas to inpaint. If this arg is not passed, the inpainting/outpainting mask has to be embedded as alpha channel.

r2_upload.description: The r2 upload link to use to upload this image.

items.description: The r2 upload link to use to upload this image.

prompt.description: The prompt which will be sent to Stable Diffusion to generate an image.

n_iter.description: The amount of images to generate.

use_nsfw_censor.description: When true will apply NSFW censoring model on the generation.

id.description: The ID of this message

origin.description: The origin of this message. Typically this will be the horde moderators.

expiry.description: The date at which this message will expire.

max_pixels.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a higher size than this worker provides.

step_count.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a higher step count that the worker wants.

unsafe_ip.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they came from an unsafe IP.

img2img.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they requested img2img.

painting.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they requested inpainting/outpainting.

post-processing.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they requested post-processing.

lora.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they requested loras.

controlnet.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they requested a controlnet.

worker_id.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a specific worker.

performance.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they required higher performance.

nsfw.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a nsfw generation which this worker does not provide.

blacklist.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a generation with a word that this worker does not accept.

untrusted.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a trusted worker which this worker is not.

models.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a different model than what this worker provides.

bridge_version.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they require a higher version of the bridge than this worker is running (upgrade if you see this in your skipped list).

kudos.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because the user didn't have enough kudos when this worker requires upfront kudos.

censored.description: OBSOLETE (start using meta): If True, this resulting image has been censored.

id.description: The UUID of this generation.

generation.description: R2 result was uploaded to R2, else the string of the result.

name.description: The name for the style. Case-sensitive and unique per user.

prompt.description: The prompt template which will be sent to Stable Diffusion to generate an image. The user's prompt will be injected into this. This argument MUST include a '{p}' which specifies the part where the user's prompt will be injected and an '{np}' where the user's negative prompt will be injected (if any)

public.description: When true this style will be listed among all styles publicly.When false, information about this style can only be seen by people who know its ID or name.

nsfw.description: When true, it signified this style is expected to generare NSFW images primarily.

items.description: Tags describing this style. Used for filtering and discovery.
The models to use with this style.

sharedkey.description: The UUID of a shared key which will be used to fulfil this style when active.

height.description: The height of the image to generate.

width.description: The width of the image to generate.

items.description: The list of post-processors to apply to the image, in the order to be applied.

karras.description: Set to True to enable karras noise scheduling tweaks.

tiling.description: Set to True to create images that stitch together seamlessly.

hires_fix.description: Set to True to process the image at base resolution before upscaling and re-processing or to use Stable Cascade 2-pass.

clip_skip.description: The number of CLIP language processor layers to skip.

workflow.description: Explicitly specify the horde-engine workflow to use.

transparent.description: Set to True to generate the image using Layer Diffuse, creating an image with a transparent background.

id.description: The UUID of the style. Use this to use this style of retrieve its information in the future.

message.description: Any extra information from the horde about this request.

id.description: The UUID of the style. Use this to use the style or retrieve its information in the future.

use_count.description: The amount of times this style has been used in generations.

creator.description: The alias of the user to whom this style belongs to.

id.description: The UUID of this example.

url.description: Any extra information from the horde about this request.

primary.description: When true this image is to be used as the primary example for this style.

id.description: The SharedKey ID.

username.description: The owning user's unique Username. It is a combination of their chosen alias plus their ID.

name.description: The Shared Key Name.

kudos.description: The Kudos limit assigned to this key.

expiry.description: The date at which this API key will expire.

utilized.description: How much kudos has been utilized via this shared key until now.

max_image_pixels.description: The maximum amount of image pixels this key can generate per job. -1 means unlimited.

max_image_steps.description: The maximum amount of image steps this key can use per job. -1 means unlimited.

max_text_tokens.description: The maximum amount of text tokens this key can generate per job. -1 means unlimited.

name.description: The name for the style. Case-sensitive and unique per user.

prompt.description: The prompt template which will be sent to Stable Diffusion to generate an image. The user's prompt will be injected into this. This argument MUST include a '{p}' which specifies the part where the user's prompt will be injected and an '{np}' where the user's negative prompt will be injected (if any)

public.description: When true this style will be listed among all styles publicly.When false, information about this style can only be seen by people who know its ID or name.

nsfw.description: When true, it signified this style is expected to generare NSFW images primarily.

items.description: Tags describing this style. Used for filtering and discovery.
The models to use with this style.

sharedkey.description: The UUID of a shared key which will be used to fulfil this style when active.

prompt.description: The prompt which will be sent to KoboldAI to generate text.

softprompt.description: Specify which softpompt needs to be used to service this request.

trusted_workers.description: When true, only trusted workers will serve this request. When False, Evaluating workers will also be used which can increase speed but adds more risk!

validated_backends.description: When true, only inference backends that are validated by the AI Horde devs will serve this request. When False, non-validated backends will also be used which can increase speed but you may end up with unexpected results.

slow_workers.description: When True, allows slower workers to pick up this request. Disabling this incurs an extra kudos cost.

items.description: Specify up to 5 workers which are allowed to service this request.

worker_blacklist.description: If true, the worker list will be treated as a blacklist instead of a whitelist.

items.description: Specify which models are allowed to be used for this request.

dry_run.description: When true, the endpoint will simply return the cost of the request in kudos and exit.

proxied_account.description: If using a service account as a proxy, provide this value to identify the actual account from which this request is coming from.

disable_batching.description: When true, This request will not use batching. This will allow you to retrieve accurate seeds. Feature is restricted to Trusted users and Patreons.

allow_downgrade.description: When true and the request requires upfront kudos and the account does not have enough The request will be downgraded in max context and max tokens so that it does not need upfront kudos.

webhook.description: Provide a URL where the AI Horde will send a POST call after each delivered generation. The request will include the details of the job as well as the request ID.

style.description: A horde style ID or name to use for this generation

extra_slow_workers.description: When True, allows very slower workers to pick up this request. Use this when you don't mind waiting a lot.

max_context_length.description: Maximum number of tokens to send to the model.

frmtadsnsp.description: Input formatting option. When enabled, adds a leading space to your input if there is no trailing whitespace at the end of the previous action.

frmtrmblln.description: Output formatting option. When enabled, replaces all occurrences of two or more consecutive newlines in the output with one newline.

frmtrmspch.description: Output formatting option. When enabled, removes #/@%}{+=~|\^<> from the output.

frmttriminc.description: Output formatting option. When enabled, removes some characters from the end of the output such that the output doesn't end in the middle of a sentence. If the output is less than one sentence long, does nothing.

singleline.description: Output formatting option. When enabled, removes everything after the first line of the output, including the newline.

items.description: Array of integers representing the sampler order to be used.

use_default_badwordsids.description: When True, uses the default KoboldAI bad word IDs.

items.description: An array of string sequences whereby the model will stop generating further tokens. The returned text WILL contain the stop sequence.

seed.title: Generation Seed
seed.description: The seed which generated this text.

type.description: The relevance of the metadata field

value.description: The value of the metadata field

ref.description: Optionally a reference for the metadata (e.g. a lora ID)

max_length.description: The maximum amount of tokens this worker can generate.

max_context_length.description: The max amount of context to submit to this AI for sampling.

items.description: The available softprompt files on this worker for the currently running model.

id.description: The UUID for this text generation.

items.description: The UUID for this text generation.

ttl.description: The amount of seconds before this job is considered stale and aborted.

softprompt.description: The soft prompt requested for this generation.

model.description: Which of the available models to use for this request.

prompt.description: The prompt which will be sent to KoboldAI to generate the text.

max_context_length.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a higher max_context_length than what this worker provides.

max_length.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded more generated tokens that what this worker can provide.

matching_softprompt.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded an available soft-prompt which this worker does not have.

name.description: The name for the style. Case-sensitive and unique per user.

prompt.description: The prompt template which will be sent to Stable Diffusion to generate an image. The user's prompt will be injected into this. This argument MUST include a '{p}' which specifies the part where the user's prompt will be injected.

public.description: When true this style will be listed among all styles publicly.When false, information about this style can only be seen by people who know its ID or name.

nsfw.description: When true, it signified this style is expected to generare NSFW images primarily.

items.description: Tags describing this style. Used for filtering and discovery.
The models to use with this style.

id.description: The UUID of the style. Use this to use the style or retrieve its information in the future.

use_count.description: The amount of times this style has been used in generations.

creator.description: The alias of the user to whom this style belongs to.

name.description: The name for the style. Case-sensitive and unique per user.

prompt.description: The prompt template which will be sent to Stable Diffusion to generate an image. The user's prompt will be injected into this. This argument MUST include a '{p}' which specifies the part where the user's prompt will be injected.

public.description: When true this style will be listed among all styles publicly.When false, information about this style can only be seen by people who know its ID or name.

nsfw.description: When true, it signified this style is expected to generare NSFW images primarily.

items.description: Tags describing this style. Used for filtering and discovery.
The models to use with this style.

name.description: The name for the collection. Case-sensitive and unique per user.

public.description: When true this collection will be listed among all collections publicly.When false, information about this collection can only be seen by people who know its ID or name.

items.description: The styles to use in this collection.

id.description: The UUID of the collection. Use this to use this collection of retrieve its information in the future.

name.description: The name for the collection. Case-sensitive and unique per user.

type.description: The kind of styles stored in this collection.

public.description: When true this collection will be listed among all collection publicly.When false, information about this collection can only be seen by people who know its ID or name.

use_count.description: The amount of times this collection has been used in generations.

name.description: The unique name for this style

id.description: The ID of this style

username.description: The user's unique Username. It is a combination of their chosen alias plus their ID.

id.description: The user unique ID. It is always an integer.

kudos.description: The amount of Kudos this user has. The amount of Kudos determines the priority when requesting image generations.

evaluating_kudos.description: (Privileged) The amount of Evaluating Kudos this untrusted user has from generations and uptime. When this number reaches a prespecified threshold, they automatically become trusted.

concurrency.description: How many concurrent generations this user may request.

worker_invited.description: Whether this user has been invited to join a worker to the AI Horde and how many of them. When 0, this user cannot add (new) workers to the horde.

moderator.description: This user is a AI Horde moderator.

worker_count.description: How many workers this user has created (active or inactive).

items.description: Privileged or public when the user has explicitly allows it to be public.
(Privileged) The list of shared key IDs created by this user.

trusted.description: This user is a trusted member of the AI Horde.

flagged.description: (Privileged) This user has been flagged for suspicious activity.

vpn.description: (Privileged) This user has been given the VPN role.

service.description: This is a service account used by a horde proxy.

education.description: This is an education account used schools and universities.

customizer.description: When set to true, the user will be able to serve custom Stable Diffusion models which do not exist in the Official AI Horde Model Reference.

special.description: (Privileged) This user has been given the Special role.

deleted.description: This user has been marked for deletion.

suspicious.description: (Privileged) How much suspicion this user has accumulated.

pseudonymous.description: If true, this user has not registered using an oauth service.

contact.description: (Privileged) Contact details for the horde admins to reach the user in case of emergency.

admin_comment.description: (Privileged) Information about this users by the admins

account_age.description: How many seconds since this account was created.

accumulated.description: The ammount of Kudos accumulated or used for generating images.

gifted.description: The amount of Kudos this user has given to other users.

donated.description: The amount of Kudos this user has donated to public goods accounts like education.

admin.description: The amount of Kudos this user has been given by the AI Horde admins.

received.description: The amount of Kudos this user has been given by other users.

recurring.description: The amount of Kudos this user has received from recurring rewards.

awarded.description: The amount of Kudos this user has been awarded from things like rating images.

styled.description: The amount of Kudos this user has been awarded for styling other people's requests.

type.description: The style type, image or text

items.description: (Privileged) The list of active text generation IDs requested by this user.
(Privileged) The list of active image generation IDs requested by this user.
(Privileged) The list of active alchemy generation IDs requested by this user.

amount.description: How much recurring Kudos this user receives monthly.

last_received.description: Last date this user received monthly Kudos.

megapixelsteps.description: How many megapixelsteps this user has requested.

requests.description: How many images this user has requested.

megapixelsteps.description: How many megapixelsteps this user has generated.

fulfillments.description: How many images this user has generated.

megapixelsteps.description: How many megapixelsteps this user has generated or requested.

tokens.description: How many token this user has generated or requested.

image.description: How many images this user has generated, requested or styled.

text.description: How many texts this user has generated, requested or styled.

interrogation.description: How many texts this user has generated or requested.

kudos.description: The amount of kudos to modify (can be negative).

concurrency.description: The amount of concurrent request this user can have.

usage_multiplier.description: The amount by which to multiply the users kudos consumption.

worker_invited.description: Set to the amount of workers this user is allowed to join to the horde when in worker invite-only mode.

moderator.description: Set to true to make this user a horde moderator.

public_workers.description: Set to true to make this user display their worker IDs.

monthly_kudos.description: When specified, will start assigning the user monthly kudos, starting now!

username.description: When specified, will change the username. No profanity allowed!

trusted.description: When set to true,the user and their servers will not be affected by suspicion.

flagged.description: When set to true, the user cannot tranfer kudos and all their workers are put into permanent maintenance.

customizer.description: When set to true, the user will be able to serve custom Stable Diffusion models which do not exist in the Official AI Horde Model Reference.

vpn.description: When set to true, the user will be able to onboard workers behind a VPN. This should be used as a temporary solution until the user is trusted.

service.description: When set to true, the user is considered a service account proxying the requests for other users.

education.description: When set to true, the user is considered an education account and some options become more restrictive.

special.description: When set to true, The user can send special payloads.

undelete.description: When set to true, A user's who's marked to be deleted will become active again.

filtered.description: When set to true, the replacement filter will always be applied against this user

reset_suspicion.description: Set the user's suspicion back to 0.

contact.description: Contact details for the horde admins to reach the user in case of emergency. This is only visible to horde moderators.

admin_comment.description: Add further information about this user for the other admins.

new_kudos.description: The new total Kudos this user has after this request.

concurrency.description: The request concurrency this user has after this request.

usage_multiplier.description: Multiplies the amount of kudos lost when generating images.

worker_invited.description: Whether this user has been invited to join a worker to the horde and how many of them. When 0, this user cannot add (new) workers to the horde.

monthly_kudos.description: The user's new monthly kudos total.

undeleted.description: True if the user was undeleted with this operation.

proxy_passkey.description: The new service account proxy passkey.

kudos.description: The Kudos limit assigned to this key. If -1, then anyone with this key can use an unlimited amount of kudos from this account.

expiry.description: The amount of days after which this key will expire. If -1, this key will not expire.

name.description: A descriptive name for this key.

max_image_pixels.description: The maximum amount of image pixels this key can generate per job. -1 means unlimited.

max_image_steps.description: The maximum amount of image steps this key can use per job. -1 means unlimited.

max_text_tokens.description: The maximum amount of text tokens this key can generate per job. -1 means unlimited.

requests_fulfilled.description: How many images this worker has generated.

kudos_rewards.description: How many Kudos this worker has been rewarded in total.

performance.description: The average performance of this worker in human readable form.

threads.description: How many threads this worker is running.

uptime.description: The amount of seconds this worker has been online for this AI Horde.

maintenance_mode.description: When True, this worker will not pick up any new requests.

paused.description: (Privileged) When True, this worker not be given any new requests.

info.description: Extra information or comments about this worker provided by its owner.

nsfw.description: Whether this worker can generate NSFW requests or not.

owner.description: Privileged or public if the owner has allowed it. The alias of the owner of this worker.

ipaddr.description: Privileged. The last known IP this worker has connected from.

trusted.description: The worker is trusted to return valid generations.

flagged.description: The worker's owner has been flagged for suspicious activity. This worker will not be given any jobs to process.

suspicious.description: (Privileged) How much suspicion this worker has accumulated.

uncompleted_jobs.description: How many jobs this worker has left uncompleted after it started them.

items.description: Which models this worker if offering.
Which forms this worker if offering.

contact.description: (Privileged) Contact details for the horde admins to reach the owner of this worker in emergencies.

bridge_agent.description: The bridge agent name, version and website.

max_pixels.description: The maximum pixels in resolution this worker can generate.

megapixelsteps_generated.description: How many megapixelsteps this worker has generated until now.

img2img.description: If True, this worker supports and allows img2img requests.

painting.description: If True, this worker supports and allows inpainting requests.

post-processing.description: If True, this worker supports and allows post-processing requests.

lora.description: If True, this worker supports and allows lora requests.

controlnet.description: If True, this worker supports and allows controlnet requests.

sdxl_controlnet.description: If True, this worker supports and allows SDXL controlnet requests.

max_length.description: The maximum tokens this worker can generate.

max_context_length.description: The maximum tokens this worker can read.

tokens_generated.description: How many tokens this worker has generated until now.

type.description: The Type of worker this is.

name.description: The Name given to this worker.

id.description: The UUID of this worker.

online.description: True if the worker has checked-in the past 5 minutes.

generated.description: How much Kudos this worker has received for generating images.

uptime.description: How much Kudos this worker has received for staying online longer.

name.description: The Name given to this team.

id.description: The UUID of this team.

worker_id.description: The ID of the worker this message is intended for.

origin.description: The origin of this message. Typically this will be the horde moderators.

expiry.description: The number of hours after which this message expires.

maintenance.description: Set to true to put this worker into maintenance.

maintenance_msg.description: if maintenance is True, you can optionally provide a message to be used instead of the default maintenance message, so that the owner is informed.

paused.description: (Mods only) Set to true to pause this worker.

info.description: You can optionally provide a server note which will be seen in the server details. No profanity allowed!

name.description: When this is set, it will change the worker's name. No profanity allowed!

team.description: The team towards which this worker contributes kudos.  It an empty string ('') is passed, it will leave the worker without a team. No profanity allowed!

deleted_id.description: The ID of the deleted worker.

deleted_name.description: The Name of the deleted worker.

maintenance.description: The new state of the 'maintenance' var for this worker. When True, this worker will not pick up any new requests.

paused.description: The new state of the 'paused' var for this worker. When True, this worker will not be given any new requests.

info.description: The new state of the 'info' var for this worker.

name.description: The new name for this this worker.

team.description: The new team of this worker.

maintenance_mode.description: When True, this horde will not accept new requests for image generation, but will finish processing the ones currently in the queue.

invite_only_mode.description: When True, this horde will not only accept worker explicitly invited to join.

raid_mode.description: When True, this horde will not always provide full information in order to throw off attackers.

queued_requests.description: The amount of waiting and processing image requests currently in this horde.

queued_text_requests.description: The amount of waiting and processing text requests currently in this horde.

worker_count.description: How many workers are actively processing prompt generations in this horde in the past 5 minutes.

text_worker_count.description: How many workers are actively processing prompt generations in this horde in the past 5 minutes.

thread_count.description: How many worker threads are actively processing prompt generations in this {horde_noun} in the past 5 minutes.

text_thread_count.description: How many worker threads are actively processing prompt generations in this {horde_noun} in the past 5 minutes.

queued_megapixelsteps.description: The amount of megapixelsteps in waiting and processing requests currently in this horde.

past_minute_megapixelsteps.description: How many megapixelsteps this horde generated in the last minute.

queued_forms.description: The amount of image interrogations waiting and processing currently in this horde.

interrogator_count.description: How many workers are actively processing image interrogations in this {horde_noun} in the past 5 minutes.

interrogator_thread_count.description: How many worker threads are actively processing image interrogation in this {horde_noun} in the past 5 minutes.

queued_tokens.description: The amount of tokens in waiting and processing requests currently in this horde.

past_minute_tokens.description: How many tokens this horde generated in the last minute.

performance.description: The average speed of generation for this model.

queued.description: The amount waiting to be generated by this model.

jobs.description: The job count waiting to be generated by this model.

eta.description: Estimated time in seconds for this model's queue to be cleared.

name.description: The Name of a model available by workers in this horde.

count.description: How many of workers in this horde are running this model.

date_published.description: The date this newspiece was published.

importance.description: How critical this piece of news is.

items.description: Tags for this newspiece.
URLs for more information about this newspiece.

name.description: The name of the team. No profanity allowed!

info.description: Extra information or comments about this team.

id.description: The ID of the team.

name.description: The Name of the team.

info.description: Extra information or comments about this team provided by its owner.

requests_fulfilled.description: How many images this team's workers have generated.

kudos.description: How many Kudos the workers in this team have been rewarded while part of this team.

uptime.description: The total amount of time workers have stayed online while on this team.

creator.description: The alias of the user which created this team.

worker_count.description: How many workers have been dedicated to this team.

name.description: The name of the team. No profanity allowed!

info.description: Extra information or comments about this team.

deleted_id.description: The ID of the deleted team.

deleted_name.description: The Name of the deleted team.

ipaddr.description: The IP address or CIDR to add from timeout.

hours.description: For how many hours to put this IP in timeout.

ipaddr.description: The IP address or CIDR to remove from timeout.
The CIDR which is in timeout.

seconds.description: How many more seconds this IP block is in timeout

days.description: For how many days to put this worker's IP in timeout.

source_image.description: The public URL of the image to interrogate.

slow_workers.description: When True, allows slower workers to pick up this request. Disabling this incurs an extra kudos cost.

webhook.description: Provide a URL where the AI Horde will send a POST call after each delivered generation. The request will include the details of the job as well as the request ID.

name.description: The type of interrogation this is.

id.description: The UUID of the request. Use this to retrieve the request status in the future.

message.description: Any extra information from the horde about this request.

state.title: Interrogation State
state.description: The overall status of this interrogation.

form.description: The name of this interrogation form.

state.title: Interrogation State
state.description: The overall status of this interrogation.

name.description: The Name of the Worker.

items.description: Users with priority to use this worker.
The type of interrogation this worker can fulfil.

amount.description: The amount of forms to pop at the same time.

bridge_agent.description: The worker name, version and website.

threads.description: How many threads this worker is running. This is used to accurately the current power available in the horde.

max_tiles.description: The maximum amount of 512x512 tiles this worker can post-process.

id.description: The UUID of the interrogation form. Use this to post the results in the future.

form.description: The name of this interrogation form

source_image.description: The URL From which the source image can be downloaded.

r2_upload.description: The URL in which the post-processed image can be uploaded.

worker_id.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a specific worker.

untrusted.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they demanded a trusted worker which this worker is not.

bridge_version.description: How many waiting requests were skipped because they require a higher version of the bridge than this worker is running (upgrade if you see this in your skipped list).

filter_type.description: The integer defining this filter type.

replacement.description: The replacement string for this regex.

suspicion.description: Rates how suspicious the provided prompt is. A suspicion over 2 means it would be blocked.

items.description: Which words in the prompt matched the filters.

id.description: The UUID of this filter.

filter_type.description: The integer defining this filter type.

replacement.description: The replacement string for this regex.

user.description: The moderator which added or last updated this regex.

filter_type.description: The integer defining this filter type.

regex.description: The full regex for this filter type.

filter_type.description: The integer defining this filter type.

replacement.description: The replacement string for this regex.

images.description: The amount of images generated during this period.

ps.description: The amount of pixelsteps generated during this period.

additionalProperties.description: The amount of requests fulfilled for this model.

requests.description: The amount of text requests generated during this period.

tokens.description: The amount of tokens generated during this period.

additionalProperties.description: The amount of requests fulfilled for this model.
